overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through a prairie ranch setting. The character approaches wooden ranch buildings under a clear blue sky, passing a windmill and encountering a horse rider near the main house.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie ranch approach with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the ranch buildings in the distance

entered.detail: worn dirt path with grass growing on the edges
tall green prairie grass on both sides of the path
snow-capped mountain range on the horizon
small weathered wooden ranch building with rusted roof
tall metal windmill structure behind the cabin

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open prairie grassland with distant mountains visible on the horizon. A small wooden cabin and windmill gradually come into view on the left side as the character approaches the ranch complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: ranch path between cabin and open field

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the side cabin toward the main ranch house

entered.detail: weathered wooden post fence lining the path
larger wooden ranch building with covered porch and decorative trim

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the smaller cabin building as a wooden fence comes into view on the left. The main ranch house becomes visible ahead in the distance while the windmill recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: fence-lined approach to main ranch house

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced path approaching the main ranch house entrance

entered.detail: large wooden wagon wheels leaning against the main house wall

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the wooden fence, the character approaches the main ranch house where wagon wheels lean against the wall. The side cabin passes out of view behind as the main building dominates the foreground.

events.description: horse rider emerges from left and trots past the character

agents.ego_description: continuing past the main house as a horse rider passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting from left to right past the character

segments.scene_description: A horse rider passes by from left to right as the character walks past the main ranch house. The wooden fence ends and the character continues beyond the building complex into the open ranch yard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open prairie landscape toward the heart of a rustic ranch complex. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through expansive grassland, with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character advances, a small wooden cabin and a windmill gradually emerge on the left, signaling the approach to the ranch. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the cabin and a wooden fence comes into view, while the windmill recedes into the background. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the main ranch house standing prominently in the distance ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a ranch perimeter that transitions from a confined fenced path into an open yard. It begins with the character walking alongside a wooden fence, approaching the main ranch house where wagon wheels lean against the exterior wall. As the side cabin recedes from view, the main building dominates the foreground, creating a sense of enclosure. The scene then shifts as a horse rider passes from left to right, coinciding with the end of the wooden fence. Finally, the camera follows the character as they move beyond the building complex and emerge into the expansive openness of the ranch yard.
